base: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl font-bold text-sm transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none

variant.secondary: bg-alan-dark dark:bg-alan-accent text-white dark:text-alan-dark shadow-floating hover:scale-105
variant.white: bg-white dark:bg-dark-surface border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 text-alan-dark dark:text-white shadow-sm hover:border-alan-accent
variant.outline: border border-emerald-200 dark:border-emerald-800 text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-50 dark:hover:bg-emerald-900/10
variant.gray: bg-gray-100 text-gray-900 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-white hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700
